subcodes.first_line: Behold what the All-Merciful hath revealed in the Qur'án: "No Messenger cometh unto them but they mock at him." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انظر ما انزله الرحمن فی الفرقان مایاتیهم من رسول الا کانوا به یستهزون و
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @petitions to authorities, @martyrs and martyrdom, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
